caption: The video features Dave Vellante, Co-Founder & Co-CEO of SiliconANGLE Media, Inc., speaking at MongoDB World 2022, an event held at the Javits Center in New York, NY. Dressed in a formal suit and tie, Vellante appears to be engaged in a discussion or interview, likely addressing topics related to technology, data management, or the MongoDB platform. The setting is professional, with a backdrop that includes a door and a window, suggesting an indoor conference or exhibition space. The video is sponsored by MongoDB, as indicated by the logo and text overlay, which also includes hashtags #MDW22 and #theCUBE, hinting at the event's branding and social media engagement.
